_meta.description: English language pack — UI + Assistant translations

welcome_subtitle: A system for saving, analyzing and connecting ideas.
home_intro: MindMesh is a tool for working with ideas.
home_description: It is a living database where ideas are compared, analyzed, and developed with AI support.
home_point_1: Capture an idea — from draft to refined concept
home_point_4: Develop ideas over time without losing history or authorship
home_conclusion: MindMesh helps bring ideas from the first thought to a real project.
login_hint: If no password is set, you can sign in without it. You can add one later.
cabinet_ideas_hint: Your ideas history, statuses, development, and connections will appear here.
simple_fallback_message:
The idea was not saved.
Reason: {reason}
simple2_label_raw: Briefly describe your idea or improvement
simple2_placeholder: Describe your idea in free form...
simple2_error_short: Please provide a more detailed description.
advanced_placeholder_dev: This feature is under development. Full implementation in MindMesh 2.0.
assistant_greeting: Hi! Describe your idea in free form. It doesn't have to be perfect — I'll help you shape it 🙂
assistant_need_choice: ⚠️ First choose what to do with the found similarity below.
assistant_ask_title: 👉 Now write a short and clear title for this idea.
assistant_ask_keywords: 👉 Now write a few keywords (comma separated) to make the idea easy to find.
assistant_ask_name: 👉 Now write your name (as it should appear as the author).
assistant_ask_email: 👉 Now enter your email (so we can contact you if needed).
assistant_review_ready: ✅ I’ve assembled your idea card. Please check if everything is correct:
assistant_edit_done: ✅ Great, I updated the card. Is this better now?
assistant_error_generic: Hmm… something went wrong. Let’s try again 🙂
assistant_hint_found: It seems this idea already exists in the database:
assistant_user_view: I want to view the similar idea.
assistant_reply_view: Okay, later we will add idea cards. For now, let's continue describing your idea 🙂
assistant_user_improve: I want to develop this idea as an improvement.
assistant_reply_improve: Great! Then let's focus on how your version is better or different.
assistant_user_separate: I want to keep this idea as a separate one.
assistant_reply_separate: Okay. Then we continue describing your idea as a separate one 🙂
assistant_need_draft: 💭 It seems your idea touches an existing topic. Do you want to save it as a draft?
validation_bad_text: 🤖 This looks like random text. Please try to write something meaningful 🙂
sa_ai_coming: AI configuration will be available in next version.
